title: Sacworm
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Sacworms''' were [[Yuuzhan Vong]] creatures used to hold beverages or soups.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Traitor]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
